display.purpose: Wordmark and top-level screen titles. Heading serif only.

headline.purpose: Dialog titles, empty-state headings, feature cards.

body.purpose: Running text, descriptions, list-item dish names.

label.purpose: Menu numbers, badge text, captions, helper text.

shadows.name: rest
shadows.purpose: Default resting card lift off the rice ground.

shadows.name: hover
shadows.purpose: Card hover/focus; the dish lifts toward you.

shadows.name: inset-toggle
shadows.purpose: Raised selected chip in the like-toggle and active segmented tab.

shadows.name: dialog
shadows.purpose: Modals and lightbox only — the one place a deeper shadow is allowed.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Default easing for color/lift state transitions (150–250ms).

motion.name: press-scale
motion.purpose: Active press feedback on buttons and cards, paired with a haptic tick.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The headline action pill — salmon, white, semibold, generously rounded with a satisfying press.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 0.5rem; height: 2.5rem; padding: 0 1.25rem; border: none; border-radius: 9999px; background: #F07868; color: #fff; font-family: 'DM Sans Variable', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1), transform 0.15s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: rgba(240,120,104,0.9); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(240,120,104,0.5); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: scale(0.97); }

components.name: Outline Button
components.description: Secondary action — transparent ground, oat hairline border, fills warm sand on hover.
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 0.375rem; height: 2rem; padding: 0 1rem; border: 1px solid #D8D4C4; border-radius: 9999px; background: #F4F0E2; color: #2C372D; font-family: 'DM Sans Variable', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s, color 0.2s; } .ds-btn-outline:hover { background: #E6E2D3; } .ds-btn-outline:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(240,120,104,0.5); }

components.name: Badge
components.description: Small fully-rounded status chip — salmon-on-white by default; used for menu numbers and item status.
components.css: .ds-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.25rem; height: 1.25rem; padding: 0.125rem 0.5rem; border-radius: 9999px; background: #F07868; color: #fff; font-family: 'DM Sans Variable', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; white-space: nowrap; }

components.name: Restaurant Card
components.description: Soft blob-rounded crema surface that floats off the rice ground on a translucent ring, lifting on hover.
components.html:
Sushi Hana
14 piatti salvati · ultima visita martedì
components.css: .ds-card { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 0.25rem; padding: 1.25rem; border-radius: 2rem; background: #FDFAF0; box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 1px rgba(44,55,45,0.10), 0 2px 12px rgba(0,0,0,0.04); cursor: pointer; transition: box-shadow 0.25s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1), transform 0.15s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-card:hover { box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 1px rgba(44,55,45,0.10), 0 8px 24px rgba(0,0,0,0.06); } .ds-card:active { transform: scale(0.98); } .ds-card-title { font-family: 'Fraunces Variable', Georgia, serif; font-size: 1.25rem; font-weight: 700; color: #2C372D; } .ds-card-desc { font-family: 'DM Sans Variable', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; color: #7A8878; }

components.name: Search Input
components.description: Transparent field with oat border; focus shifts to a salmon ring with no layout shift.
components.css: .ds-input { width: 100%; height: 2rem; padding: 0.25rem 0.625rem; border: 1px solid #D8D4C4; border-radius: 1rem; background: transparent; color: #2C372D; font-family: 'DM Sans Variable', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; outline: none; transition: border-color 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #7A8878; } .ds-input:focus-visible { border-color: #F07868; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(240,120,104,0.5); } @media (min-width: 768px) { .ds-input { font-size: 0.875rem; } }

components.name: Like / Dislike Toggle
components.description: Signature memory control — two 32px round buttons on a track; selecting lifts a crema chip with salmon (liked) or nori (disliked) icon.
components.css: .ds-rate { display: inline-flex; gap: 0.25rem; padding: 0.25rem; border-radius: 9999px; background: rgba(230,226,211,0.5); } .ds-rate-btn { width: 2rem; height: 2rem; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; border: none; border-radius: 9999px; background: transparent; color: #7A8878; opacity: 0.6; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-rate-btn:hover { opacity: 1; background: rgba(253,250,240,0.5); } .ds-rate-up.is-active { opacity: 1; background: #FDFAF0; color: #F07868; box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.06); } .ds-rate-down.is-active { opacity: 1; background: #FDFAF0; color: #2C372D; box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.06); }

narrative.overview: *maki feels like the cozy glow of a neighborhood sushi counter rendered in software. The whole system runs on three committed brand colors — nori green ink, salmon accent, and a warm rice ground — so that opening the app at the table feels like sitting down at a familiar spot, not booting a utility. Everything is soft-edged and hand-kept: generous pill rounding, diffuse ambient shadows, a Fraunces serif that gives every heading a characterful, almost handwritten warmth. The interface is intimate and tactile, built to be glanced at and tapped one-handed. It is a product surface that never forgets it serves a meal, not a dashboard — refusing the cold of a SaaS dashboard, the noise of a food-delivery app, the joylessness of enterprise UI, and the clutter of a template menu site.
keyCharacteristics: Three-color committed palette: nori ink, salmon accent, rice ground
Pill-and-blob rounding — almost nothing is sharp-cornered
Soft ambient elevation; surfaces rest gently lifted
Fraunces serif headings over DM Sans body — warmth from the type pairing
Tactile, haptic, one-handed; defers to the meal
Dark mode as a first-class peer, not an afterthought

rules.name: The One Warm Voice Rule
rules.body: Salmon is the only accent and appears on ≤10% of any screen — one CTA, one active toggle, one focus ring at a time. Its rarity is what makes a reorder feel like a small celebration.

rules.name: The No Cold Gray Rule
rules.body: There is no neutral gray in this system. Every 'gray' is a desaturated green or warm sand pulled toward nori or rice. A cold #888 anywhere is a bug.

rules.name: The Serif-Heads-Only Rule
rules.body: Fraunces is for headings and the wordmark exclusively. Buttons, labels, inputs, data, and badges are always DM Sans.

rules.name: The Diffuse-And-Warm Rule
rules.body: Shadows are always wide-radius and ≤6% opacity. A tight, dark drop-shadow is forbidden. Press states deepen the lift; they never add a harsh outline.

dos: Do keep salmon to ≤10% of any screen — one CTA, one active toggle, one focus ring (The One Warm Voice Rule).
Do pull every neutral toward nori or rice. Sage-grays and warm sands only; a cold #888 is a bug (The No Cold Gray Rule).
Do use Fraunces for headings and the wordmark exclusively; DM Sans for everything operable (The Serif-Heads-Only Rule).
Do round generously — pills for actions, rounded-[2rem] blobs for feature cards, rounded-4xl for badges.
Do keep shadows wide and ≤6% opacity; deepen lift on hover/press (The Diffuse-And-Warm Rule).
Do give key actions a press state (active:scale/translate-y-px) and a haptic tick. The app should feel physical.
Do treat dark mode as a peer: deep nori near-black ground (#141714), warm rice text — verify both themes on every change.
Do surface past votes where the decision is made, not in a separate screen.
donts: Don't build a generic SaaS dashboard — no gray card-grids, chart widgets, or admin chrome. This is a notebook, not an analytics panel.
Don't adopt aggressive food-delivery app energy — no neon CTAs, discount banners, upsells, or push-y patterns. Nothing is being sold.
Don't ship a sterile enterprise UI — no Material-by-default, heavy chrome, or joyless dense forms. Warmth is non-negotiable.
Don't clutter like a template restaurant menu site — no stock-photo soup, no busy layouts. Scanning stays effortless.
Don't use a second accent color or two salmon elements competing on one screen.
Don't use tight, dark drop-shadows or hard borders — if it looks like a 2014 app, the blur is too small and the opacity too high.
Don't put a display serif inside a button, label, input, or data cell.
Don't use border-left/border-right >1px as a colored accent stripe, gradient text, or decorative glassmorphism.
